Container.Name: owlet-bridge-native
Container.Overview:
Native Owlet Cam -> RTSP bridge, the docker-wyze-bridge way. NO emulator. Enter your Owlet account in the web control panel (http://[IP]:8088), it logs into the Owlet cloud, connects to the camera over ThroughTek/Kalay (TUTK), and serves the video as RTSP/WebRTC/HLS with a go2rtc UI (http://[IP]:1984). Point Frigate at rtsp://[IP]:8554/owlet.
EVERYTHING is configured in the UI: account credentials, region, camera UID/AuthKey, AV settings. The "Connect & Diagnose" button runs the real login and shows a live log so you can see exactly what happens (and share it for help).
ONE manual prerequisite: the proprietary TUTK .so libs are not shipped. Extract them from the Owlet APK you own (see repo: native-bridge/bridge/extract-libs.sh) into the host folder mapped to /app/libs.

Config.Name: Control panel (8088)
Config.Description: Web UI — enter Owlet login, see logs.

Config.Name: TUTK libs (/app/libs)
Config.Description: Folder containing x86_64/libIOTCAPIs.so + libAVAPIs.so extracted from the Owlet APK.
